creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #20)
> Can portmgr@ land the patch here and backport to 2017Q3 (maybe also 2017Q2)?

Nevermind. I'll land review D11377 under maintainer timeout. According to a comment in that review maintainer doesn't seem as opposed to an update that brings newer LLVM support as well. ;\
